data.description: The US and China will hold Treasury staff-level trade talks on Thursday, focusing on previously discussed trade issues, though no progress has been reported on tariffs or US farm exports. The technical talks will not address the TikTok deal or the upcoming Bessent–He meeting,

data.title: SJE® acquires AMI Global to enhance IIoT capabilities, aiming for a digital-first approach.
data.description: SJE, Inc., a leading control systems company based in DETROIT LAKES, Minn., revealed plans on Sept. 24, 2025, to create a digital-first setting to boost technological advancement. The company took a significant step by acquiring AMI Global from Cimbria Capital. This move aims to enhance SJE's industry position and expand its capabilities.

data.title: Decagon launches Decagon University for teams in customer experience, unveils Decagon Voice 2.0 with major upgrades.
data.description: In San Francisco today, the top AI agents platform for customer experience, Decagon, unveiled Decagon University. This flagship AI education initiative aims to equip all teams, including customer experience, product, and engineering, with the necessary skills and knowledge to develop, enhance, and expand AI agents effectively. The unveiling took place at the first-ever Decagon Dialogues event and was accompanied by the introduction of Decagon Voice 2.0. This updated version offers significant performance enhancements and cross-channel memory capabilities, further solidifying Decagon's position as a frontrunner in the AI industry.

data.title: FDA announcement on leucovorin for autism gains attention. Leucovorin could aid in improving communication, behavior in kids.
data.description: A recent study has found that prescription-strength folinic acid could have a positive impact on communication, behavior, and development in children diagnosed with autism. The study, based in Irvine, California, revealed promising results indicating an improvement in these key areas. This development comes after the U.S. Food and Drug Administration announced the initiation of the approval process for leucovorin calcium, a significant step in potentially providing access to this treatment for patients in need. Stay tuned for further updates on this breakthrough in autism intervention.

data.title: Jimmy Kimmel's comeback episode garners 6.2M viewers, nearly quadrupling the show's usual viewership.
data.description: The most recent episode of "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" following a suspension by Disney saw four times the usual number of viewers tuning in.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Indexes slightly down, hot stocks like Astera Labs and Credo Technology affected.
data.description: On Wednesday, stock market indexes experienced slight decreases, with Astera Labs and Credo Technology standing out as notable gainers amidst the overall decline. Despite this, Dow Jones Futures remained steady, with a number of popular stocks witnessing a downturn.

data.title: Federal Signal Corp to acquire Scranton Manufacturing Co Inc d/b/a New Way Trucks, expanding into refuse collection vehicles. Sept. 24, 2025.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, the Downers Grove-based company Federal Signal Corporation (NYSE: FSS) disclosed that they have entered into a definitive contract to purchase Scranton Manufacturing Company Inc., also known as...

data.title: Richmond American to offer sneak peek of Hevostila Estates in Eagle, Idaho. Opening in November, preview event on Sept. 24.
data.description: In preparation for its November opening, Hevostila Estates is set to hold a preview event on Saturday in Eagle, Idaho. Richmond American Homes of Idaho, Inc., a Sekisui House U.S., Inc. subsidiary, shared news of this special preview. This culminating event is an opportunity for prospective buyers to explore the offerings of the estate.
Macron and Zelenskyy hold bilateral meeting

data.title: UniQure's stock surged nearly 250% as their gene therapy showed success in treating Huntington's disease.
data.description: UniQure saw a significant surge in stock value on Wednesday following the announcement that their experimental gene therapy effectively treated Huntington's disease. The news led to a remarkable increase of nearly 250% in UniQure's stock price, sparking optimism about a potential cure for the disease.

data.title: Analyst recommends buying 3 bitcoin miners due to high AI demand.
data.description: An analyst at Arete has started coverage on three bitcoin miners with a buy rating. The analyst highlighted the strong demand for artificial intelligence as a driving factor. This move was made public on Wednesday.

data.title: Acadia Pharma shares plummet after rare disease drug fails; Soleno stock surges.
data.description: Acadia Pharmaceuticals saw a significant decrease in its stock value on Wednesday following the unsuccessful results of its experimental treatment for a rare genetic disorder. The company's shares tumbled by a substantial margin on this news. Conversely, Soleno shares experienced a surge amidst these developments.

data.title: Richmond American Homes opens new Las Vegas community, Archer Park at Mountain's Edge, offering 3 floor plans.
data.description: Richmond American Homes of Nevada, Inc., a subsidiary of Sekisui House U.S., Inc., has introduced the grand opening of Archer Park at Mountain's Edge in Las Vegas. This new residential community offers three meticulously planned floor plans. The unveiling took place on September 24, 2025.

data.title: Walker & Dunlop secures $156M financing for a five-property Southeast US portfolio with 1,351 units.
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, Walker & Dunlop, Inc. revealed securing $156,621,000 to fund five multifamily properties across the Southeast and Texas. These transactions, finalized this year, encompass 1,351 units within four Southeast properties and one in Texas. Facilitated by Allan Edelson and Joe Tarantino of Walker & Dunlop Multifamily Finance, the financing was orchestrated for Boston Capital Real Estate, a valued long-time client.

data.title: AZ Vitality & Wellness in Peoria offers brain stimulation device for depression treatment. Launch party on Oct 23.
data.description: A launch party is set to take place on October 23 in Peoria, Arizona, to introduce a new treatment for depression and anxiety. This innovative technology is now offered at AZ Vitality and Wellness in the mentioned location. This news was announced on September 24, 2025. The event aims to showcase the new treatment to individuals struggling with these mental health conditions.
